amendments.text:
(a) Category N. A placard shall be pro-
vided in front of and in clear view of
the pilot stating: "No acrobatic maneu-
vers including spins approved."
(b) Category U. A placard shall be
provided in clear view of the pilot stat-
ing: "Acrobatic maneuvers are limited
to the following: _____________________
<list approved maneuvers)."
(c) CategorY A. A placard shall be
provided in clear view of the pilot which
lists all approved acrobatic maneuvers
and the recommended entry air speed for
each. If inverted flight maneuvers are
not approved. the placard shall bear a.
notation to this effect.
